title: National Theatre Live: Mrs. Warren's Profession
original_title: National Theatre Live: Mrs. Warren's Profession
overview: Vivie Warren is a woman ahead of her time. Her mother, however, is a product of that old patriarchal order. Exploiting it has earned Mrs. Warren a fortune – but at what cost?
